nasb.text: Let his children wander about and beg; And let them seek sustenance far from their ruined homes.

esv.text: May his children wander about and beg, seeking food far from the ruins they inhabit!

cnv.text: 願他的兒女流離失所，到處求乞； 願他們從他們破毀的家中被趕逐出去。

ccb.text: 愿他的孩子流浪行乞， 被赶出自己破败的家。

csbs.text: 愿他的儿女流离失所去乞讨， 从他们的废墟中出来寻找食物。
